title: NQBlade Performance
author: Some_Fly_4552
selftext: NQBlade is a rule-based NAS100 trading bot built around a trend-following approach. It uses trend alignment, higher-timeframe confirmation, volatility filters, and structured risk management to look for cleaner setups instead of taking random entries. Trades are managed with a stop loss, partial take profits, and a trailing stop, with the goal of combining controlled risk with the ability to capture larger moves.
